violations.text: The floors under the reach-in units have an accumulation of old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025
Several bags of chips were observed gnawed and adulterated. Product was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by gnawed product and accumulation of droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving have an accumulation of rodent droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025
Several rodent droppings were observed under refrigeration units and under shelving. Areas to be cleaned and monitored. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025
The hand-washing sink in the bathroom was lacking paper towels. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
Spilled debris/liquid was accumulating around the reach-in refrigerator in the back storage area. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
